extortion.description: [AI generated] Compact Mould Ltd. is a Canadian-based injection mold design and manufacturing company. Established in 1990, it specializes in producing high-quality, precision-engineered plastic injection molds. The company caters to a variety of industries including automotive, cosmetic, medical device, and packaging. It offers services from conceptual design and prototyping to full-scale production. It prides itself on its high customer satisfaction, quick turnaround times and excellent quality control.
